name: Loading
description: A versatile loading component with two display modes: default (replaces content) and cover (overlays content).
usage_guidelines: Use 'default' type to replace content while loading.
Use 'cover' type to overlay loading state on existing content.
Provide customLoader for branded loading experiences.
Set loading prop to control visibility.

customLoader.description: Custom loading indicator to replace default spinner.

styling_info.visual_description: Default type: centered spinner. Cover type: semi-transparent overlay with centered spinner on top of content.

Dont: Don't show loading for very fast operations
Don't forget to hide loading on error
